basic_details.job_title: AIIA Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Associate, Panchkarma Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Ayurveda (AIIA) has officially announced the Research Associate, Panchkarma Technician Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings under Advt. No. O-15/2/2026-AIIA. Candidates aged up to 40 years and holding a Postgraduate degree in Ayurveda with specialization in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa or 12th pass with a One-Year Certificate Course in Panchkarma Technician are eligible to participate. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in interview scheduled for 11 June 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Ayurveda with specialization in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa OR 12th passed with One Year Certificate Course in Panchkarma Technician
qualification.details: Research Associate: Postgraduate degree in Ayurveda with specialization in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa from a recognized University. Desirable: Three years' experience after master's degree. PhD or any postgraduate diploma course in public health/clinical research/research methodology, etc. Persons having proficiency in assessment and treatment of Osteoarthritis of the Knee. Working knowledge of MS Office, including MS Word, MS Excel. Panchkarma Technician: 12th passed from any govt. recognized board. One Year Certificate Course in Panchkarma Technician with one year working experience in a reputed hospital.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AIIA Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate and Panchkarma Technician posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced by AIIA. Out of these, 1 vacancy is for the Research Associate post and 4 vacancies are for the Panchkarma Technician post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate position, candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree in Ayurveda with specialization in Panchakarma/Kayachikitsa from a recognized University. Experience and PhD are desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Panchkarma Technician position?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Panchkarma Technician post should have passed 12th standard from a government-recognized board and possess a One Year Certificate Course in Panchkarma Technician with one year of working experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for these AIIA posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Research Associate and Panchkarma Technician posts is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected Research Associate will receive a salary of ₹ 58,000/- per month, plus HRA as admissible for Delhi-NCR.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Panchkarma Technician post?
faq.answer: The selected Panchkarma Technician will receive a consolidated salary of ₹ 24,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will include an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Ayurveda (AIIA), New Delhi - 110076. Candidates should report at the specified venue on the interview date.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AIIA Recruitment 2026 is scheduled to be held on 11th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.
